title: Unable to login after password reset
description: User receives 'Invalid credentials' error even after resetting password. Tried clearing cache and using incognito mode.

title: API endpoint returning 500 errors
description: The /api/v2/invoices endpoint has been intermittently failing with 500 errors since yesterday. Approximately 15% of requests failing.

title: Feature request: Bulk export functionality
description: Customer requesting ability to export multiple reports simultaneously instead of one at a time.

title: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: App crashes immediately after splash screen on iOS 17.5 devices. Crash logs attached.

title: Incorrect billing calculation
description: Invoice #INV-2345 shows double charge for subscription tier. Customer was overcharged by $49.99.

title: Slow dashboard loading times
description: Dashboard takes 15-20 seconds to load. Previously loaded in under 3 seconds. Affects all users in EU region.

title: Documentation update needed
description: Webhook documentation outdated. New fields added in v2 API not documented.

title: Cannot add team members
description: Admin users unable to invite new team members. 'Invite' button greyed out despite having available seats.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: Users report not receiving email notifications for mentions or task assignments. SMTP logs show no errors.

title: Search results incomplete
description: Search function not returning all relevant results. Missing approximately 30% of expected records.

title: SSO integration failing
description: Okta SSO authentication suddenly stopped working. Users redirected to error page after login attempt.

title: Dark mode UI glitches
description: Text visibility issues in dark mode. Some buttons have white text on white background.
